monitor_the_situation.title: Detained Gaza Doctor Severely Beaten in Israeli Jail
— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 55m ago. Lawyer says Dr. Hussam Abu Safiya was beaten so severely in Israeli detention he was unrecognizable.
IDF Finds Hezbollah Weapons Cache in Southern Lebanon Home
— S3 · Conflict · Southern Lebanon, Lebanon · 1h ago. IDF discovered over 150 weapons, including RPG and missile launchers, in a civilian residence in southern Lebanon.
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 3h ago. Iran's IRGC Navy bombed a vessel and warned other ships to only use routes approved by the Persian Gulf Strait Authority or face danger.
Iran Executes More Than 100 People in June Alone, Human Rights Group Claims
